contentBlocks.original:
शरणागत दीनार्त परित्राण परायणे
सर्वस्यार्ति हरे देवि नारायणि नमोऽस्तु ते
contentBlocks.transliteration:
śaraṇāgata dīnārta paritrāṇa parāyaṇe
sarvasyārti hare devi nārāyaṇi namo'stu te
contentBlocks.translation: O Nārāyaṇī, who is dedicated to rescuing the distressed and those who have sought refuge, who removes all suffering, I bow to you.
contentBlocks.meanings: शरणागत (śaraṇāgata) – those who sought refuge (śaraṇa:refuge | āgata:arrived); दीनार्त (dīnārta) – distressed and suffering (dīna:distressed | ārta:suffering); परित्राण (paritrāṇa) – rescue; परायणे (parāyaṇe) – dedicated to; सर्वस्यार्ति (sarvasyārti) – all suffering (sarvasya:of all | ārti:suffering); हरे (hare) – removes; देवि (devi) – O goddess; नारायणि (nārāyaṇi) – O Nārāyaṇī; नमः (namaḥ) – I bow; अस्तु (astu) – let it be; ते (te) – to you;
